title: Combating a New Virus Menance in Groundnut: An ICRISAT-NARS Success Story
abstract:
The problem
Millions of smallholder  farmers in the rainfed
semi-arid tropics of theIndian subcontinentdepend on groundnut,  sunflower, cotton and   vegetable crops for their livelihood. A new threat to
groundnut emerged in
2000 in the form of a   virus that causes lethal necrosis. The virus cameto light in the district of Anantapur, a majorgroundnut producing area in India. This diseasepeanut stem necrosis disease (PSND), destroyed
 the majority of the crop in the dsitrict
